## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] docs (documentation)
- [ ] refactor (internal change)
- [ ] test (tests only)
- [ ] ci (pipeline/tooling)

## Validation

- [ ] `ruff check framehunter tests`
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `docker build -t framehunter:latest .`
- [ ] Manual CLI run with sample input

## Checklist

- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
- [ ] README/docs updated when needed
- [ ] Error paths handled
- [ ] No secrets or credentials added

## Related Issue

Closes #<issue-number>
